name: Beans Kale
recipeIngredient: Salt, pepper, red pepper flakes, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cooked white beans with lemon juice, salt, pepper and red pepper flakes until combined.
2. Heat gently and mash the bean mixture slightly.
3. Chop the onions and saute until golden.
4. Slice the greens into shreds and add to the garlic/onion mix.
5. Continue sauteing until the greens wilt.
6. Serve the beans on top of the greens.
